title: Top K Frequent Elements
description:
Given an integer array `nums` and an integer `k`, return the `k` most frequent
elements. Return them sorted in ascending order so the output is deterministic.
constraints: k is in the range [1, number of unique elements]

solutions.summary: Tally counts, order by frequency (descending), keep k, then sort.

steps.title: Count occurrences
steps.explanation: Build a frequency map of each value.

steps.title: Order by frequency and take k
steps.explanation: Sort the distinct values by count (descending, ties by value), keep the first `k`, then sort those ascending.
